title: Comment from Rocha, David, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: The Sparked FHIR accelerator in Australia is in early stages of creating a AU Encounter Record (country realm encounter record) for FHIR Documents. ASTP/ONC can monitor this project if this could apply for the future of encounter records using FHIR. See attached doc.
